title: Perfomance Client Modpack
description: Adds best client mods for servers.
body:
# Perfomance Client Modpack
## About
Perfomance Client Modpack is a perfomance modpack for servers! This modpack can be used on servers with lower version due to [ViaFabricPlus](https://modrinth.com/mod/viafabricplus/versions). It's well optimized and has all mods to get the best experience on servers.
## Additional information
This modpack contains mods **Axiom** and **Flashback**, if you don't like them, you may freely delete them and replace with any other mods you like!

My friend said that this is a good modpack for his SMP server. For people who wants to host local: I've tested only mod [Essential](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential), which is pre-installed in this modpack, and an app [playit.gg](https://playit.gg/login?redirect=/account/tunnels?). Test other mods on your own risk!
